{{Quote|It is such a quiet thing, to fall. But far more terrible is to admit it.|[[Kreia]]|audio=KreiaAdmitIt.flac|<ref name="KotorII" />}}
The following events took place in '''3951 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
{{Quote|Know that much may happen here, but above all, do not forget this—you may trust in me. We cradle each other's lives, and what threatens one of us, threatens us both. And if you find you cannot trust me, trust in your training. Trust in yourself. Never doubt what you have done.|Kreia's final advice to Meetra Surik|audio=KreiaExileBond.flac|<ref name="KotorII" />}}
*The [[Peragus Mining Facility]] is [[Skirmish at Peragus II|destroyed]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] is [[Battle of Khoonda|visited]] by the Jedi [[Meetra Surik]] in her search for [[Vrook Lamar]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] is visited by Meetra Surik in her search for [[Lonna Vash]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] is [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (First Jedi Purge)|visited]] by Meetra Surik in her search for [[Zez-Kai Ell]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] is [[Blockade of Onderon|visited]] by Meetra Surik in her search for [[Kavar]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*The [[Battle of Onderon (Onderon Civil War)|Onderon Civil War]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Darth Nihilus]] [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|leads]] a failed [[Battle of Telos IV|attack]] on [[Citadel Station]] over [[Telos IV]].<ref name="KotorII" />
*The [[First Jedi Purge]] and the [[Dark Wars]] end with the [[Battle of Malachor|destruction]] of [[Malachor V]].<ref name="KotorII" />

==Battles==
{{Quote|Yes, always. From the moment you awoke, I have used you. I have used you so that you might become strong, stronger than I. I used you to keep the Lords of the Sith from condemning the galaxy to death with their power unchecked. I used you to lure them to Telos, where they could be, at last, fought and killed. I used you to reveal Atris' corruption, so that her teachings could be ended before they began. I used you to gather the Jedi so they could be destroyed. And I used you to make those who wounded me reveal themselves, so they could be killed by the Republic.|Kreia admits her manipulations|audio=FromTheMomentYouAwoke.flac|<ref name="KotorII" />}}

{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the player is darksided in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the place of death for various people is different. Vrook Lamar will be killed on Dantooine (whereas Azkul will not), Zez-Kai Ell will die on Nar Shaddaa along with [[Mira]], and Kavar will die on Onderon along with Queen Talia (with Vaklu surviving). On Malachor V, G0-T0 is not destroyed, instead [[Bao-Dur's remote]] will be, thus stopping the Mass Shadow Generator and preventing the planet's destruction.<ref name="KotorII" />
